name: Raspberry Fool
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pureed raspberries, sweetened to taste
1 tbsp Kirsch or rum, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pureed raspberries and kirsch in a bowl.
2. Gently fold the mixture into the whipped cream until well combined.
3. Chill the fool in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
4. Other berries or fruits may be substituted for the raspberries.
